summary:
Take an immediate X-ray for precise evaluation; consider performing a pulpectomy due to high risks associated with this type of fracture given its severity and potential impact on dental health over time.
To summarize Agent1’s reasoning:

The initial step involves taking an urgent X-ray to assess the full extent of the fracture accurately. Considering the severe nature of a Class III fracture involving significant tooth structure loss, a prophylactic pulpotomy may also be necessary to prevent further complications such as pulp necrosis. Considering the severe nature of a Class III fracture involving significant tooth structure loss, a prophylactic pulpotomy may also be necessary to prevent further complications such as pulp necrosis.
